prs.title: Alerting: Add ability to query notification counts in historian API

DashboardLibrary: Add assistant available check for tracking events
Enhance RBAC settings with local folder cache TTL support
GroupBy: responsive datasource picker
FiltersOverview: put applied groupBy at the top
Provisioning: Add fix folder IDs button
Zanzana: expose OpenFGA typesystem_cache_size config option
CI: Remove CGO from our vocabulary
`AuthZ-Service`: Prefetch folder tree for `BatchCheck`
Plugins: Improve meta response performance
Chore: Reenable a11y tests, remove from @acceptance, add documentation
[release-12.4.1] Graphite: Update frame references in response
Alerting: add inhibition rules docs
Graphite: Update frame references in response
Provisoning: fix repo controller quota update behavior
Provisioning: Map nanogit HTTP errors in health checks
[release-12.4.1] Docs: remove Ref URIs from Prometheus
[release-12.4.1] Docs: Removed ref URIs from MSSQL
Rendering: Remove deprecated plugin support
[release-12.4.1] Docs: Advisor updates for G13
CI: Skip failing smoke test
Chore: Upgrade plugins sdk to v0.65.0
[RRC Patch Steady] Analytics: Keep internal dashboard id  (#119115)
Docs: Advisor updates for G13
chore: replace `config.panels` in exporters
chore: syncs api clients and open api
Secrets: Add /admin/secrets/secure-values backend route
Chore: Allow changes to packages/grafana-openapi/ and backend
chore: remove `config.panels` in DashboardMigrator.test.ts
chore: replace `config.panels` in state/utils
I18n: Download translations from Crowdin
Alerting: Update alerting module to 68d44e174fc77df2bdeee9d4542e389269769a17
Docs: remove ref URIS from OpenTSDB
HTTPServer: Wire public dashboard service (#118917) (#119099)
KV Store Garbage Collector implementation

feat: app manifest reconciler

[release-12.4.1] Docs: Removed Ref URIs from InfluxDB
QueryEditor: Alert updates
Provisioning: Mark JobSpec.action as required in OpenAPI schema
Provisioning: Validate write permissions before queueing jobs
Analytics: Keep internal dashboard id
Provisioning: Return empty list instead of nil for file and resource list items
Dashboards: Support k8s resource inside /api/dashboards/db
QueryEditor: Harden datasource logic + document it
Saved Queries: Template Var handling on loading
Provisioning: set default repo types differently
FieldTypeMatcherEditor: ComboBox
Suggestions: Fix no data scenario error
Plugins: Move install sync after provisioning
datasources: create a legacy implementation of connectionsClient
[release-12.4.1] docs(alerting): update links to alert examples in Grafana Play
Docs: removed ref URIS from MySQL
QueryEditor: Enforce minimum sidebar width in pixels

Azure: Package updates

Variables: Fix missing static options rendering when options have no properties

fix: status n subresource keyfunc (#118196)
Home: preserve query params when redirecting to home page
Unified Storage: Excludes manifests who dont have kinds defined
NewProvisionedFolderForm: Show banner when folder is pushed but not yet synced to Grafana
IAM: Add kubernetesUsersApi feature toggle
SearchStateManager: Add createdBy tracking
FilterPill: Selected border style update
Provisioning: Add ParseFileResource to unify decode+fallback logic
Fix readOnly field missing on version from k8s to legacy and back
Provisioning: quota track in incremental pulls
Provisioning: add sync condition to repo
DashboardLibrary: Add Faro logging in community dashboard filter logic
IAM: Add accesscontrol in User search
OpenAPI: Fix URL property
Team Folders: Change permissions check to be "can set permissions"
[release-12.4.1] Unified: fix parquet and use it as fallback in migrations
Provisioning: Skip path conflict checks when sync is disabled
Alerting: Add historian API for querying notification alerts detail.
Provisioning: bump nanogit to v0.4.0 for structured HTTP auth errors
CI: Fix changelog generation to handle releases w/ >1000 commits
